query:
SELECT id, customerName, contractStartDate, contractType, arrUsd, onboardingFeePaid 
FROM deals 
WHERE aeId = 2
ORDER BY contractStartDate
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT id, customerName, contractStartDate, contractType, arrUsd, onboardingFeePaid 
FROM deals 
WHERE aeId = 2
ORDER BY contractStartDate
